title: Machine power / boot timeline (filter)
description: Keeps only the events that mark the machine's power lifetime: boot (EventLog 6005 / Kernel-General 12), shutdown (6006 / Kernel-General 13), dirty/unexpected shutdown (6008 / Kernel-Power 41), and daily uptime (6013). Enable it to see the machine's on/off history without the noise.

sections.name: PowerFilter
sections.description: Keep boot / shutdown / dirty-shutdown / uptime events

rules.name: keep-power-events
rules.match: The Event log service was started|The Event log service was stopped|The previous system shutdown at|The system uptime is|rebooted without cleanly shutting down|The operating system started at|The operating system is shutting down|Kernel-Power|Kernel-Boot
